reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 gates passed. Gate 1: Function is registered as P2P RPC handler (reachable). Gate 2: Attack relies on untrusted P2P peers, not compromised trusted components. Gate 3: Fusaka-specific PeerDAS code, P2P network in scope. Spec violation confirmed: when requests fall outside data_column_serve_range, validateDataColumnsByRange returns nil (L198-200), causing handler to return nil (L72-74) which sends success (0x00) instead of ResourceUnavailable (0x03) as required by P2P spec. An attacker can trigger this via P2P by sending DataColumnSidecarsByRangeRequest with startSlot before minValidSlot. Verdict is CONFIRMED_POTENTIAL because while the spec deviation is clear and attacker-triggered, the network-wide impact is uncertain (response code error may cause interoperability issues but not immediate crashes/splits).
reviewed_items.spec_reference: data_column_sidecars_by_range must reject requests outside data_column_serve_range with ResourceUnavailable response code
